name: Reptilianne Scylla
name_jp: レプティレス・スキュラ
desc: If this card destroys a monster with 0 ATK by battle, you can Special Summon that monster from the Graveyard to your side of the field in face-up Defense Position. The effect(s) of that monster is negated.
mnst_eff: If this card destroys a monster with 0 ATK by battle, you can Special Summon that monster from the Graveyard to your side of the field in face-up Defense Position. The effect(s) of that monster is negated.
eff: If this card destroys a monster with 0 ATK by battle, you can Special Summon that monster from the Graveyard to your side of the field in face-up Defense Position. The effect(s) of that monster is negated.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
